title: Studio Arlette
tagline: Interior design shaped with warmth, texture, and calm restraint.

home_page.section_intro: A curated edit of spaces with layered materials, warmth, and a quietly lived-in elegance.

projects_page.section_intro: A portfolio of interiors and renovations shown as an image-led reel, with each project opening into a fuller story.
